markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Review analytics, new content plans, and workflow updates.](https://fathom.video/share/6o86J1VVpmcdJvTFkjevnF-BYjmP8o9i?tab=summary&timestamp=372.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**Analytics:** Site traffic is up \~4% MoM, but the high-value "CMS platforms" content cluster is down, and AI content growth has stalled.](https://fathom.video/share/6o86J1VVpmcdJvTFkjevnF-BYjmP8o9i?tab=summary&timestamp=384.0)
  - [**Attribution:** GA4 undercounts AI traffic by misattributing it as "organic" or "direct." Jesse's form-submission data will be used to create a more accurate report.](https://fathom.video/share/6o86J1VVpmcdJvTFkjevnF-BYjmP8o9i?tab=summary&timestamp=773.0)
  - [**Workflow:** A new, simplified Content OS in Airtable and Slack bots will streamline Webstacks' content review and approval process.](https://fathom.video/share/6o86J1VVpmcdJvTFkjevnF-BYjmP8o9i?tab=summary&timestamp=1382.0)
  - [**Content Strategy:** Jessalynn will create supporting content for the "Coffee Chat" series, while Jakub's full content audit will inform a larger, long-term strategy.](https://fathom.video/share/6o86J1VVpmcdJvTFkjevnF-BYjmP8o9i?tab=summary&timestamp=1142.0)

## Topics

### Analytics & Performance Review

  - [**Site-Wide Metrics:**](https://fathom.video/share/6o86J1VVpmcdJvTFkjevnF-BYjmP8o9i?tab=summary&timestamp=389.0)
      - [Overall traffic growth: **+4% MoM**.](https://fathom.video/share/6o86J1VVpmcdJvTFkjevnF-BYjmP8o9i?tab=summary&timestamp=389.0)
      - [Page 1 keywords: **+4% MoM**.](https://fathom.video/share/6o86J1VVpmcdJvTFkjevnF-BYjmP8o9i?tab=summary&timestamp=389.0)
      - [Domain Rating: **+12 points YTD** (per Ahrefs).](https://fathom.video/share/6o86J1VVpmcdJvTFkjevnF-BYjmP8o9i?tab=summary&timestamp=421.0)
  - [**Content Cluster Performance:**](https://fathom.video/share/6o86J1VVpmcdJvTFkjevnF-BYjmP8o9i?tab=summary&timestamp=494.0)
      - [**High-Growth:** "CMS platforms" & "AI clusters" are seeing strong growth (10-18%).](https://fathom.video/share/6o86J1VVpmcdJvTFkjevnF-BYjmP8o9i?tab=summary&timestamp=502.0)
      - [**Underperforming:** The "CMS platforms" cluster is down. Jakub will investigate the cause (e.g., publish dates) during the full audit.](https://fathom.video/share/6o86J1VVpmcdJvTFkjevnF-BYjmP8o9i?tab=summary&timestamp=517.0)
      - [**Stagnant:** The AI content cluster is flat at \~70 visits/month.](https://fathom.video/share/6o86J1VVpmcdJvTFkjevnF-BYjmP8o9i?tab=summary&timestamp=559.0)
          - [**Hypothesis:** Content cannibalization.](https://fathom.video/share/6o86J1VVpmcdJvTFkjevnF-BYjmP8o9i?tab=summary&timestamp=587.0)
          - [**Action:** Jakub will investigate for potential consolidation or refreshes.](https://fathom.video/share/6o86J1VVpmcdJvTFkjevnF-BYjmP8o9i?tab=summary&timestamp=587.0)
  - [**LLM Referral Traffic:**](https://fathom.video/share/6o86J1VVpmcdJvTFkjevnF-BYjmP8o9i?tab=summary&timestamp=623.0)
      - [**Trend:** Down **-15% MoM** (Sep→Oct).](https://fathom.video/share/6o86J1VVpmcdJvTFkjevnF-BYjmP8o9i?tab=summary&timestamp=623.0)
      - [**Context:** Still significantly higher than August levels.](https://fathom.video/share/6o86J1VVpmcdJvTFkjevnF-BYjmP8o9i?tab=summary&timestamp=623.0)
      - [**Hypothesis:** A recent change in how ChatGPT displays links could be the cause. Jakub will monitor for a wider industry trend.](https://fathom.video/share/6o86J1VVpmcdJvTFkjevnF-BYjmP8o9i?tab=summary&timestamp=623.0)

### Attribution & Reporting Accuracy

  - [**Problem:** GA4 undercounts AI traffic by misattributing it as "organic" or "direct."](https://fathom.video/share/6o86J1VVpmcdJvTFkjevnF-BYjmP8o9i?tab=summary&timestamp=773.0)
  - [**Evidence:** Jesse's form-submission data shows users self-report "ChatGPT" as a source, even when GA4 doesn't.](https://fathom.video/share/6o86J1VVpmcdJvTFkjevnF-BYjmP8o9i?tab=summary&timestamp=773.0)
  - [**Solution:** Jakub will combine "organic" and "referral" (from LLMs) data in reports to create a more accurate picture of AI-driven traffic.](https://fathom.video/share/6o86J1VVpmcdJvTFkjevnF-BYjmP8o9i?tab=summary&timestamp=888.0)

### Content Strategy & Audit

  - [**Short-Term Plan:** Jessalynn is creating supporting content for the "Coffee Chat" series.](https://fathom.video/share/6o86J1VVpmcdJvTFkjevnF-BYjmP8o9i?tab=summary&timestamp=1142.0)
      - [**Process:** Break down each Coffee Chat blog → identify internal linking opportunities & new content ideas.](https://fathom.video/share/6o86J1VVpmcdJvTFkjevnF-BYjmP8o9i?tab=summary&timestamp=1142.0)
      - [**Approval:** Jesse will review the plan but trusts the team to proceed without individual article-level approvals to maintain momentum.](https://fathom.video/share/6o86J1VVpmcdJvTFkjevnF-BYjmP8o9i?tab=summary&timestamp=1314.0)
  - [**Long-Term Plan:** Jakub's full content audit is ongoing.](https://fathom.video/share/6o86J1VVpmcdJvTFkjevnF-BYjmP8o9i?tab=summary&timestamp=1101.0)
      - [**Goal:** Map all content to inform site structure, internal linking, and future ideation.](https://fathom.video/share/6o86J1VVpmcdJvTFkjevnF-BYjmP8o9i?tab=summary&timestamp=1101.0)
      - [**Opportunity:** Refreshing and consolidating overlapping content for quick performance gains.](https://fathom.video/share/6o86J1VVpmcdJvTFkjevnF-BYjmP8o9i?tab=summary&timestamp=1125.0)

### New Workflow & Reporting

  - [**Content OS (Airtable):** A simplified view was created to streamline Webstacks' review process.](https://fathom.video/share/6o86J1VVpmcdJvTFkjevnF-BYjmP8o9i?tab=summary&timestamp=1382.0)
      - [**Features:** Direct tabs for "Topics Awaiting Approval," "Ready for Review," and "Published Articles."](https://fathom.video/share/6o86J1VVpmcdJvTFkjevnF-BYjmP8o9i?tab=summary&timestamp=1481.0)
      - [**Functionality:** In-app buttons ("Approve," "Reject," "Hold") automate status updates.](https://fathom.video/share/6o86J1VVpmcdJvTFkjevnF-BYjmP8o9i?tab=summary&timestamp=1481.0)
  - [**Slack Automation:** A bot will notify Webstacks in the shared channel when content is ready for review.](https://fathom.video/share/6o86J1VVpmcdJvTFkjevnF-BYjmP8o9i?tab=summary&timestamp=1402.0)
  - [**HubSpot Data Sheet:** Jesse added new fields to improve lead source tracking.](https://fathom.video/share/6o86J1VVpmcdJvTFkjevnF-BYjmP8o9i?tab=summary&timestamp=1696.0)
      - [**New Fields:** `First Page Seen`, `Last Page Seen`, `Recent Page Seen`, `Recent Conversion Date`, `MQL Date`, `Opportunity Date`.](https://fathom.video/share/6o86J1VVpmcdJvTFkjevnF-BYjmP8o9i?tab=summary&timestamp=1696.0)
      - [**Challenge:** The `Date Added` field is problematic because the current workflow creates duplicate records on updates.](https://fathom.video/share/6o86J1VVpmcdJvTFkjevnF-BYjmP8o9i?tab=summary&timestamp=1847.0)
      - [**Workaround:** Use `Recent Conversion Date` and `MQL Date` to infer the timing of blog influence on a lead.](https://fathom.video/share/6o86J1VVpmcdJvTFkjevnF-BYjmP8o9i?tab=summary&timestamp=2038.0)
      - [**Data Joining:** `Contact ID` on the deal tab (semicolon-separated) enables joining contact and deal data. `Company ID` can also be used to link content views to company-level deals.](https://fathom.video/share/6o86J1VVpmcdJvTFkjevnF-BYjmP8o9i?tab=summary&timestamp=2200.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**Jessalynn:** Share the "Coffee Chat" supporting content plan with Jesse and Eric.](https://fathom.video/share/6o86J1VVpmcdJvTFkjevnF-BYjmP8o9i?tab=summary&timestamp=1241.0)
  - [**Jessalynn:** Invite Eric to the new Content OS Airtable view.](https://fathom.video/share/6o86J1VVpmcdJvTFkjevnF-BYjmP8o9i?tab=summary&timestamp=1598.0)
  - [**Jessalynn:** Consult the reporting team on the `Date Added` field for the HubSpot data sheet.](https://fathom.video/share/6o86J1VVpmcdJvTFkjevnF-BYjmP8o9i?tab=summary&timestamp=2146.0)
  - [**Jakub:** Investigate the performance drop in the "CMS platforms" cluster.](https://fathom.video/share/6o86J1VVpmcdJvTFkjevnF-BYjmP8o9i?tab=summary&timestamp=517.0)
  - [**Jakub:** Analyze the AI content cluster for consolidation opportunities.](https://fathom.video/share/6o86J1VVpmcdJvTFkjevnF-BYjmP8o9i?tab=summary&timestamp=559.0)
  - [**Jakub:** Update future reports to combine "organic" and "referral" (LLM) traffic data.](https://fathom.video/share/6o86J1VVpmcdJvTFkjevnF-BYjmP8o9i?tab=summary&timestamp=888.0)
  - [**Jakub:** Provide a comprehensive update on the full content audit next week.](https://fathom.video/share/6o86J1VVpmcdJvTFkjevnF-BYjmP8o9i?tab=summary&timestamp=1101.0)
